summary: Frontend + backend verification of iter-364 fixes (post-iter-363 user regression report). All 7 items PASS end-to-end on the LIVE preview URL with admin@konekt.co.tz creds.
critical_code_review_comments: Branding resolver in /app/backend/routes/content_template_routes.py correctly merges all non-profile business_settings docs and reads contact_phone — verified GET /api/content-engine/template-data/branding now returns phone='+255 715222132' (the admin-saved invoice_branding.contact_phone value, NOT the placeholder default).

CreativeDrawer Download (data-testid=download-creative-btn) and Share-on-socials (data-testid=share-on-socials-btn) BOTH actually trigger a PNG download — confirmed via Playwright page.expect_download. Download size ~649KB, suggested filename '2026_Diary-square-promo-light.png' (Download) and '2026_Diary-square-promo.png' (Share). No '[ContentStudio]' console errors during click flow.
Share-on-socials also pops a new tab to https://api.whatsapp.com/send/?text=… (browser auto-redirects from wa.me/?text=) and the URL-encoded caption contains '+255 715222132'.

LogoBar tagline in Promo Focus layout is hardcoded to 'Everything Your Business Needs' (NOT inheriting branding.tagline 'One-stop shop for products, services & deals') — verified by inspecting innerText of [data-testid=branded-creative]: contains_everything_your_business=True, contains_one_stop_global=False.
FooterBar QR inline style width is 105.6px (was ~70.4px before — change from S.pad*1.6 → S.pad*2.4 = exactly 50% larger). Visually anchored bottom-right of creative.

OnboardingGate + OpsOnboardingModal correctly suppress on ?e2e=1: navigated /admin/group-deals?e2e=1 with localStorage konekt_e2e='1' set; no wizard/tour overlay rendered (wizard_visible=False), allowing testing-agent walkthroughs to proceed unblocked.

Caption panel inside drawer also shows '+255 715222132' (Short Caption text: '2026 Diary at TZS 32,500. +255 715222132'; Social Post: 'Konekt · +255 715222132'). No leakage of the old default '+255 712 345 678'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter-364 fixes ALL green. The download + share-on-socials buttons DO trigger downloads — caught via Playwright page.expect_download(timeout=25000). If user STILL reports 'not going through' after this round, the issue is likely environmental (browser popup blocker, ad-blocker, or specific OS/browser combo) — not a code regression. The offscreen export clone (left:-99999) renders fine inside the Sheet (drawer count=2 in DOM, both width=1080px). E2E flag works via both URL ?e2e=1 and localStorage konekt_e2e='1'.

1_backend_branding_phone.tagline: One-stop shop for products, services & deals
